steps.code: <?php require_once '/wordpress/wp-load.php'; $files = glob( WP_PLUGIN_DIR . '/*/_playground/demo-content.html' ); if ( $files ) { $plugin_dir = dirname( dirname( $files[0] ) ); $plugin_url = plugins_url( '', $plugin_dir . '/custom-tab-block.php' ); $content = str_replace( '{{PLUGIN_URL}}', $plugin_url, file_get_contents( $files[0] ) ); wp_insert_post( array( 'post_title' => 'Custom Tab Block Demo', 'post_name' => 'custom-tab-block-demo', 'post_status' => 'publish', 'post_type' => 'page', 'post_content' => $content ) ); }
